bio.hero: I build production-grade backend systems, AI-integrated chatbot platforms, and full-stack products that actually ship. My work spans backend APIs, multi-channel enterprise integrations, and the frontend/mobile surfaces teams use every day.
aboutPreview: I build production systems end-to-end — from NestJS + GraphQL backends to React frontends and React Native mobile apps. At my current role, I work on AI chatbot platforms with multi-channel social integrations for enterprise clients.

I learn fast when the project demands it, but I care more about shipping reliable systems than collecting buzzwords. Comfortable across backend APIs, product delivery, Docker-based deployment, and the glue work that makes software useful in production.
bio.full: Backend-focused full-stack engineer building AI-integrated platforms and production systems. I work across NestJS + GraphQL backends, React/Next.js dashboards, React Native mobile apps, and deployment workflows — with a strong bias toward shipping software that solves real operational problems. Previously led a 10-member intern team at FPT Software. Open to freelance, remote, and full-time opportunities.
bio.contact: Available for backend-focused full-stack roles, freelance product work, and remote collaboration across GMT+7.
